text_excerpt: Western in Westminster - Matt Western Call on: 01926 882006 About News Western in Westminster Out and about Campaigns Meet Matt Get involved Cost-Of-Living Western in Westminster Alongside my regular duties in Westminster, I am a member of the International Trade Committee, which scrutinises the Government’s trade plans. I am also a member of various All Party Parliamentary Groups, including the APPGs on Students, Video Games, Sikhs, Hindus, and Climate Change. I chair the APPGs on Motor, Electric Vehicles, and Council Housing. To look at my voting record, please go to: https://www.theyworkforyou.com/mp/25701/matt_western/warwick_and_leamington/recent Below you can view all my speeches and questions in Parliament.
